question.label: Shift since reorg
question.name: You said 'the shift since the reorg' — what feels most different about it?
question.description: Drills into the specific change she is noticing so the manager understands the nature of the disconnect.

answer: I have been quieter in leadership meetings because I am still figuring out where my voice has most leverage.

assessment.note: She is holding back in leadership meetings while she figures out where her voice has leverage — strong engagement drop, with an off-signature clarity question worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Voice leverage
new_queue.name: In those leadership meetings, what feels unclear about where your voice has leverage?

new_queue.label: Arrival check-in
new_queue.name: What's been most on your mind at work lately?

new_queue.label: Transition load
new_queue.name: Where is the reorg adding the most load for you right now?

new_queue.label: Tradeoff reset
new_queue.name: What have you been saying no to since the reorg?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What kind of support would actually make this week easier for you?

new_queue.label: Next focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to tackle first?

history.answer_excerpt: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I have been quieter in leadership meetings because I am still figuring out where my voice has most leverage.
